§6Storage Blocks, Glass & Rockwool§f

§aCompact storage, reinforced glass, and decorative rockwool blocks!§f

§6Storage Blocks§f:
Crafted from §e9§f ingots. Beacon base. Mobs cannot spawn on them.
§b• Metals§f: Copper, Tin, Silver, Lead, Aluminum, Nickel, Platinum, Iridium, Mana Infused
§b• Alloys§f: Steel, Electrum, Invar, Bronze, Constantan, Signalum, Lumium, Enderium
§b• Resources§f: Charcoal, Coal Coke

§6Hardened Glass§f:
Blast-resistant. §bInduction Smelter§f: Pulverized Lead + Pulverized Obsidian → Hardened Glass. Add metal dust for metal-tinted variants (Rich Slag byproduct).

§6Rockwool§f:
Fire-resistant decorative blocks in §e16§f colors. Smelt §bSlag§f in a furnace → Light Gray Rockwool. Dye any color with dye + existing rockwool.
